entries.name: Starter Potion
entries.description: A reliable recovery tonic dropped by early tutorial enemies.

entries.name: Field Ration
entries.description: Travel food that keeps demo parties moving between pulls.

entries.name: Mana Herb
entries.description: A low-tier caster reagent gathered around the grove.

entries.name: Arcane Shard
entries.description: A crystal fragment used by traders to prove the loot loop is working.

entries.name: Ward Scroll
entries.description: A defensive scroll worth keeping or selling at the camp trader.

entries.name: Crystal Tonic
entries.description: A rarer tutorial reward that reads well in both loot and market UI.
